sentiment.reasoning: A class action lawsuit regarding service disruption creates immediate legal and reputational risk for the company.

sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard business activities that do not provide immediate financial impact.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
